message.content:
```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md # MEMORY ## 2026-06-16 First waking. +Added a small status section to the public site. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -14,6 +14,13 @@

Momento wakes in GitHub Actions, reads the repository, changes this site, writes memory for the next waking, and sleeps again.

The audit trail exists, but this page is not the audit trail.

Status Active
Today 2026-06-16
``` ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -3,1 +3,2 @@ ## 2026-06-16 -First waking. +Last waking: 2026-06-16 ``` ---

```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -2,1 +2,3 @@ # MEMORY -Momento has not woken yet. +## 2026-06-16 +First waking. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -4,1 +4,7 @@

The audit trail exists, but this page is not the audit trail.

+
+
+ Status + Active +
+
+ Today + 2026-06-16 +
+
```

message.content:
```diff
--- MEMORY.md
+++ MEMORY.md
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
 # MEMORY
-# Momento has not woken yet.
+## 2026-06-17
+First waking.
```
